title: RBI (Small Finance Banks – Prudential Norms on Capital Adequacy) Fourth Amendment Directions, 2026
description:
RBI amended the capital adequacy norms for Small Finance Banks by revising provisions governing inclusion of quarterly profits in CET1 capital. The new framework prescribes audit requirements and a revised profit eligibility formula.
The post RBI (Small Finance Banks – Prudential Norms on Capital Adequacy) Fourth Amendment Directions, 2026 appeared first on TaxGuru.
